description: A clean uploaded draft with no pre-existing tracked changes, comments, hidden text, fields, or footnotes affecting clause text. Baseline case: must normalize trivially.

paragraphs.heading: Limitation on Liability
paragraphs.text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.

paragraphs.heading: Governing Law
paragraphs.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Delaware.
